Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We want a query that selects rows from event_log table where case_id satisfies having number of events less than or equal to 6

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can solve using a subquery or common table expression to first compute counts per case_id then join with original table for rows with count less than or equal to 6

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: SQL solution Select el from event_log el join Select case_id from event_log group by case_id having count less than or equal to 6 as valid_cases on el case_id equals valid_cases case_id

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Select all from event_log where case_id in Select case_id from event_log group by case_id having count less than or equal to 6 is another possibility

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We check that the query counts events per case_id and returns only those rows where count is less than or equal to 6
